default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss conversion improvements, SEO strategies, and content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jakub presented conversion improvement recommendations, including blog CTAs, table of contents, FAQs, and slide-ins](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Teero saw an increase to 5 blog-driven leads this month, up from the typical 3-4](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Organic traffic shows consistent 6-month growth, with strong performance in SERP features (2000+ keywords in "People Also Ask")](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [New reporting key added to clarify metrics and categories in weekly reports](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Recommendations

  - [Blog CTA: Add to sidebar with example provided; high priority](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Table of contents: Improve skimmability and SEO/AI crawling](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [FAQs: Add to backend CMS with schema markup; helps with long-tail keywords and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Slide-ins/pop-ups: Implement using Framer's built-in conversion tools](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Reuse existing ad creatives for free impressions on blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Create a "fitness hub"-style page for authority and interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Inline CTAs and banner ads across content](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)

### Content Performance and SEO

  - [5 leads generated via blog this month (up from 3-4 typical)](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Leads coming from diverse range of blog topics](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Strong SERP feature performance:](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [2000+ keywords in "People Also Ask"](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [Showing in AI overview, image pack, and "Things to know"](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [6-month organic traffic progression shows consistent growth](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Reporting Improvements

  - [New reporting key added to explain metrics and categories](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Individual dashboards still in development by the team](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nate to review CRO recommendations with Teero's designer next week](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Consider having designer join next Thursday's call](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Jakub to perform deeper analysis of SERP features and provide insights next week](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [GrowthX team to continue developing individual dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [New articles to be published tonight or tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/JTYstX39khFfMUyGy9zp9WSr_tG-ACyH?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

action_items.description: Add more examples for blog CTAs and inline CTAs to conversion improvements doc
Review conversion improvements w/ designer next week; arrange designer to join next Thu call if needed
Analyze SERP features & reporting details; prepare insights for next meeting
